name: Frozen Creamed Horseradish
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip well-chilled cream with chilled beaters in a chilled bowl until smooth.
2. Gently fold in the remaining ingredients (horseradish, white vinegar, and black pepper) to combine.
3. Lightly oil a sheet of wax paper and roll the horseradish mixture into a cylinder about 1-1/2 inches in diameter.
4. Freeze the rolled horseradish cream until firm.
5. To serve, unwrap the cylinder and slice it into 1/4-inch thick pieces.
6. Use these slices to garnish tomato, salmon, trout, ham, or veal as desired.
7. Store any unused portions frozen for later use.
